title: i built a no code workflow automation tool for the blockchain
raw_text: I built a No-Code Workflow Automation Tool for the Blockchain - Indie Hackers Home Starting Up Case Studies DB Products Ideas DB Vibe Coding Tools Subscribe to IH+ Starting Up Case Studies Ideas DB Products DB Join 1 Like 0 Bookmarks 1 Comment Report I built a No-Code Workflow Automation Tool for the Blockchain by Mariano Pardo Hi, no-coders! We built a tool similar to Zapier but for web3 and are looking for feedback and early adopters. ChainJet is a workflow-based automation platform that aims to integrate web2 and web3. You can create workflows connecting multiple services to build crypto and blockchain-related apps. If you'd like to automate something or are interested in the idea, feel free to contact me or come over to our discord . Here you can see a 3 mins demo of the platform: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zCaqp2JnFA0 Mariano Pardo posted to No-Code on August 25, 2022 1 0 Share Say something nice to marian2js… Post Comment 2 Wow!
